text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon now looks completely at home
standing center stage in a winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's gaining fame as an up-and-coming dirt
racer, and bloggers have taken note of her
concert performances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the term "Umadol" starting to become
recognized, Smart Falcon drives forward toward
her dream of becoming a top Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, given her ambitions on dirt, no one
expects her to compete in the turf Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon overhears fans saying it's a shame
they can't see Falco's high-energy performances
on a stage as grand as the Triple Crown.
